title: Edmonton Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Edmonton, with a Z-Score of -3.06. This event has been assigned a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Edmonton are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. 
 The low temperatures will result in increased energy consumption, as residents and businesses try to stay warm. 
 The cold snap is expected to last for several days, with no significant warming trend in sight.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to ensure public safety.
